title: Extract Product Proof remote staging primitives

decisions.label: env override does not propagate to module-internal ssh()
decisions.rationale: Removed env params from non-pure helpers so only pure arg/path builders accept injected env, matching the planned boundary.

decisions.label: self-test coverage is asymmetric for new pure helpers
decisions.rationale: Added scpArgs null-destination and remoteAppPathFromEnv default/override self-tests.

decisions.label: live remote SSH path not exercised in this validation pass
decisions.rationale: Live remote SSH gap is expected for this structural chunk and remains a requirement for the next behavior-touching remote-stage slice.

validationAfterReviewFixes: node tools/computer-use-e2e/run-remote-cua.mjs render-unavailable --note 'remote-stage smoke after review fixes' --run-dir /tmp/nixmac-remote-stage-unavailable-smoke
